summary: Recurring all-caps Steve whose main asset is immediate, low-latency recognition.
synopsis: An all-caps recurring Steve whose main instrument is immediate legibility.
editorialBlurb: Steve Holt is a recurring-character masterclass in compression. He shows up already branded, already ridiculous, and already useful. The name is half the mechanism: it lands with a bluntness that lets the performance skip setup and go directly to force.
whyItMatters: He is one of television's cleanest examples of a secondary Steve leaving an outsized footprint through exactness rather than screen time.
appearanceContext: Recurring side-character whose entrance beat and catchphrase do most of the structural work immediately.
sourceNotes: Recurring joke-character with enduring fan recognition.
